title: Bongo Marauder
content:
{{Top|ca|leg|notoc=1}} {{Otheruses|Bongo}} {{Easteregg}} {{AquaticVehicle |image=[[File:Bongo_Marauder.png]] |name=Bongo Marauder |designer= |manufacturer= |line= |model= |type=[[Boat/Legends|Boat]]''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' |cost= |modifier= |sysmods= |length= |width= |height= |mass= |max accel= |speed= |engine= |depth= |poweroutput= |power= |shield gen=[[Personal energy shield/Legends|Personal energy shield]] |hull= |sensor= |target= |navigation= |maincomp= |countermeasures= |armament=1 [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannon]] |complement= |bays= |escapepods= |crew=1 |skeleton= |passengers= |capacity= |cargohandling= |consumables= |lifesupport= |communications= |othersystems= |availability= |role= |firstuse= |retired= |affiliation= }} The '''Bongo Marauder''' was a fast manned [[Water/Legends|aquatic]] [[Boat/Legends|craft]] equipped with a powerful [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannon]] capable of detroying enemies in the [[Atmosphere/Legends|air]] and on the ground.{{LucasArts|url=products/battlegrounds/hintstips.htm|text=Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds - Hints and Tips}} It had a [[Personal energy shield/Legends|personal energy shield]] and a narrow, [[Color/Legends|white]] [[Hull/Legends|hull]] with a thin railing installed along the bow. The boat was driven by a lone [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Helm officer/Legends|helmsman]] who steered the boat from a lowered seat at the stern. The Bongo Marauder's helmsman had light skin and wore a white [[Captain/Legends|captain's]] [[Hat/Legends|hat]], a long-sleeved [[shirt]], and an orange [[lifejacket]]. ==Behind the scenes== {{Quote|stop ''[sic]'' answering silly goose questions, and speak of the all-mighty FORCE BOAT''"
"''Type in 'Forceboat' at the chat screen, and see what happens. You have to be over water though!|User OnlyOneCanoli and ''Galactic Battlegrounds'' director Garry M. Gaber|{{LucasArts|url=products/battlegrounds/chats2.htm|text=Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds - October 9, 2001 Chat Transcript}}}} The Bongo Marauder appeared in the [[2001]] [[LucasArts]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'', accessible by entering the cheat code "scaryneighbor" into the game's chat box. In an online chat session held on [[June 28]], 2001, prior to the game's release, a user named "Jedi_Bib" asked ''Galactic Battlegrounds'' director [[Garry M. Gaber]] if any [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] specific units were going to be included, such as a "[[The Force/Legends|Force]] Boat." Gaber replied with a smiley face emoticon that there was no Force Boat.{{LucasArts|url=products/battlegrounds/chats1.htm|text=Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds - June 28, 2001 Chat Transcript}} However, in another chat session on [[October 9]], user "OnlyOneCanoli" further inquired about the Force Boat, and Gaber stated that players could enter the code "Forceboat" over water and discover what happens. However, entering "Forceboat" does not correspond to any cheat codes in the finished game. The Bongo Marauder only spawns if the player types the code while overlooking a body of water, and multiple Bongo Marauders can be generated at one time. The color of the helmsman's shirt changes depending on the player's team color; it can be blue, red, green, yellow, gray, purple, cyan, or orange. Clicking on the Bongo Marauder while controlling it shows a profile image of a Human male against a red background. Unlike most of the cheat codes available in the game, "scaryneighbor" was not revealed in the game's [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|strategy guide]],[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]] but on the LucasArts website instead. The website did not refer to the Bongo Marauder by name, instead calling it a "Super-killer boat unit." ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' {{1st}} {{Nc}} *''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]'' {{Nc}} ==Sources== *{{LucasArts|url=products/battlegrounds/chats1.htm|text=Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds - June 28, 2001 Chat Transcript}} *{{LucasArts|url=products/battlegrounds/chats2.htm|text=Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds - October 9, 2001 Chat Transcript}} *{{LucasArts|url=products/battlegrounds/hintstips.htm|text=Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds - Hints and Tips}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Aquatic vehicle models]]
